3287230.name: Helen Keller Simulator
3287230.description:
Helen Keller Simulator is an experimental exploration game where you navigate a world without sight or sound.

With no visuals and no audio cues, you must rely entirely on whatever you stumble upon.
Let subtle tooltips guide you as you collect items, avoid unseen dangers, and traverse unfamiliar environments with no clear map or direction.

Each new area is only revealed as you find it, challenging your sense of space, memory, and orientation. Death is possible, and progress depends on learning how to feel your way through the darkness.

This is not a game about winning or a linear story.  It’s an abstract, difficult experience meant to immerse you in an unfamiliar way of perceiving a world.

Disclaimer: This is a parody game and a work of fiction. It contains no visuals, no sound, and no characters—so any resemblance to real people is purely in your imagination. The game is not endorsed by Helen Keller, her estate, or anyone else (seen or unseen). All references are deliberately exaggerated for comedic effect.  If you take a look, I’m sure it won’t be clear to see...
3287230.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
